creator: boilednut@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 226761
Image of "Using bsdinstall" page in Calibre Viewer showing all images are missing

Almost all -- if not all -- of the images are missing from the ePub version of the Handbook. I've attached an image of a page showing that none of its images are included. Although that was an image of the book in the Calibre E-Book View, I've also confirmed the problem with other viewers.

The problem seems specific to the ePub version of the Handbook since the images do appear in the PDF version.
